opening_line: Automated tenant ticket #8841: lights flickering on Floor 2. Requesting status. No intruder signal. No water signal.
notes_for_player: Electrical maintenance only. Do NOT cut power building-wide.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Intermittent since 01:40. Duration per flicker: 0.3 seconds.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Visual confirmation recommended. No anomaly class assigned.
